compiled_state.title: [CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md]: commands.test_dirs missing -> CI test-config-keys-documented.sh fails
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

CI workflow run 24946719518 fails at test-config-keys-documented.sh:
  FAIL: all config keys are documented in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (zero gap lines)
  undocumented keys found: commands.test_dirs

## Source
plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh:133 reads `commands.test_dirs` (colon-separated list of test directories used by test-batched.sh resumable bash runner). The key has no entry in plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md.

## Fix
Add entry for `commands.test_dirs` documenting purpose, format, and default behavior. This is the root cause of the latest main CI failure and blocks scripts/release.sh.

comments.body: Classification: mechanical (config syntax / docs gap; deterministic fix). Mechanical Fix Path.
comments.author: Test
